purpose: Machine-checkable engineering capability coverage for the reusable platform foundation.

capabilities.purpose: Declare reusable admin resources once and generate menus, routes, permissions, schemas and Refine metadata from the same contract.
Load menu entries from backend resources and filter them by current permissions.
Use manifest-derived permission codes for backend authorization, menus and Refine access control.

label.zh: 资源 Schema 与表单生成

capabilities.purpose: Render list, search, filter, table, form, detail and relation controls from resource schemas.

Keep schema-driven form layout presets, controlled source-level React slots, controlled runtime slot descriptors and side-detail-preview machine-checkable behind product-design, i18n, UI contract, build and browser evidence gates.

label.zh: 组织、角色组与地址码治理
label.en: Org, Role Group And Area Governance

capabilities.purpose: Keep tenants, org units, users, role groups, roles and area codes as reusable governance primitives with schema relations, row-level data scopes and regression gates.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: tenants must declare areaCode relation to area-codes
users orgUnitCode must stay optional by default
defaultFoundation.mustExcludeResources must include detailed address resource ${resource}
defaultFoundation.mustIncludeResources must not include optional personnel resource ${resource}

capabilities.purpose: Classify every built-in, optional and external business capability as a plugin-style governance contract without bloating the runtime Manifest struct.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: appears in profiles but is missing from platform capability contracts

label.zh: 能力组合 Profile 门禁

capabilities.purpose: Keep reusable capability compositions machine-checkable so deployments can enable minimal, default, app-ready, enterprise-governance or business-reference profiles without leaking optional governance or business modules into the platform default.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: keeps policy review as an optional enterprise governance profile

label.zh: 人员与岗位可选运行门禁

capabilities.purpose: Prove the optional personnel capability stays out of the default runtime while platform-personnel-ready produces admin resources, permissions, frontend entries and OpenAPI schemas for personnel profiles, positions and position assignments.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: default admin contract must not include optional personnel resource ${resource}
default capability audit must not enable personnel
rejects personnel-enabled contracts without OpenAPI, frontend or permission coverage

capabilities.purpose: Generate admin and app OpenAPI contracts and serve the admin document behind a permission-checked route.

label.zh: 后台 API 边界与查询安全
label.en: Admin API Boundary And Query Security

capabilities.purpose: Keep admin requests behind the platform API client and keep list queries as structured, schema-whitelisted POST payloads instead of raw SQL or query-string filters. Sensitivity comes only from capability manifests; encrypted fields allow only declared blind-index exact matches and cannot be sorted.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: calls fetch() outside the platform API client
AdminQueryRequest must document that raw input is never concatenated into SQL
encrypted field supports only exact-match queries
query field is not declared by resource schema

capabilities.purpose: Produce codegen previews, generated scaffold drafts and non-mutating promotion review packets as an implemented safe scaffold; runtime source writing remains disabled until source-writing is explicitly designed and approved.

Keep future source-writing generation behind explicit spec, platform/codegen/runtime/operations approvals, completed-evidence artifact schema, diff review, scaffold promotion review, target-family test mapping and scaffold safety gates while the current generator remains dry-run only.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: admin scaffold promotion review must remain not-approved
rejects source-writing approval packages without a completed evidence artifact schema
rejects source-writing approval packages without a strong artifact hash policy
rejects source-writing approval packages without an external artifact URI policy

capabilities.purpose: Provide standard system management resources for identity, RBAC, menus, audit, configuration, versions, files, sessions, monitoring and API tokens.
Persist file metadata and redacted audit events atomically, hide durable deletion tombstones immediately, retry object cleanup idempotently and purge metadata only after cleanup succeeds.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: if err := s.recordFileAudit(ctx, "file.content", record); err != nil

capabilities.purpose: Provide the files generic resource console extension for upload, authenticated preview, download, metadata inspection, audit visualization and mobile file cards without changing the object-store port or creating a standalone file manager.
Declare business-facing app routes in capability manifests and wrap session routes with app-token authorization.

label.zh: App 客户端 API 边界

capabilities.purpose: Keep downstream App, H5 and mini-program clients behind generated App clients or platform request/upload ports so business pages cannot hand-write request, upload or Authorization wiring.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: Generated clients must stay behind the app API boundary

capabilities.purpose: Validate runtime configuration before API startup so production deployments cannot use development secrets, memory-only stores or missing Redis invalidation by accident.
Keep production runtime environment variables, documentation, validation tests, preflight commands and non-mutating operations plans aligned before deployment.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: platform operations plan must keep runtimeMutation disabled
does not execute selected commands unless --run is explicit
rejects operations plans that weaken provider promotion controls
PLATFORM_CAPABILITIES must not include demo-data in production
rejects the standard template when strict secret checks are enabled

capabilities.purpose: Keep JWT session renewal, provider adapter controls, Admin-only OIDC governance, credential rotation and the implemented-disabled refresh-token-family runtime slice machine-checkable without enabling token-family behavior or approving OIDC production promotion by default.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: production runtime must not enable demo-data capability
completedEvidenceSchema.artifactURIPolicy must match production auth hardening contract
rejects provider promotion matrices that drop wechat production controls
rejects operations plans that drop production auth completed evidence schema
rejects manifest-declared auth providers missing from the provider promotion matrix
rejects production auth promotion reviews that approve active blockers
rejects promotion approval packages without a strong artifact hash policy
rejects promotion approval packages without an external artifact URI policy
rejects missing production auth promotion review preflight
production readiness must include operation policy
sliding session renewal, not a separate refresh-token rotation model
Production runtime must not enable the `demo-data` capability
Provider-backed app login must deny unconfigured providers by default

capabilities.purpose: Use local cache plus optional Redis invalidation so menus, principals, policies and sessions refresh after writes.

Keep multi-process GORM sessions record-scoped, protect admin resource snapshots with revision CAS, and reload independent peer Stores before derived-cache invalidation without treating Redis Pub/Sub as a durable consistency log.
Keep Vercel optional for admin static hosting, keep the Go API on a long-lived-service default, and require separate evidence before any full-stack Vercel runtime promotion.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: not the default deployment target for the Gin API process
vercel admin adapter must not declare API rewrites
rejects Vercel admin adapter templates that include API runtime wiring

capabilities.purpose: Keep the full platform foundation task list, dependencies, approved stack route, resource locks, parallel batches, unfinished promotion blockers and visual design gates machine-checkable.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: required unfinished task is missing from task graph
must not be implemented while its execution audit blockers are still active
tracks completed platform foundation work and promoted visual task nodes
rejects execution audits that omit the submitted promotion evidence package validator
rejects promotion blockers that do not require external artifact URI evidence

label.zh: 参考项目发现分类门禁

capabilities.purpose: Require zshenmez reference capabilities to be inspected from source evidence and classified as foundation, optional extension, business-only or deferred before they can influence platform coverage or default profiles.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: evidence signal ${signal} is missing from declared sourceSets
rejects candidate evidence signals that are absent from declared source sets
rejects business candidates that are promoted into a platform capability

label.zh: 参考项目覆盖边界门禁

capabilities.purpose: Keep reusable platform coverage, optional extension and business boundaries, and reference-project parity claims checked at area, per-resource and non-resource capability levels against admin contracts, capability audit output, capability profiles and optional reference manifests.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: must declare at least one platform capability
coverage for ${capabilityID} is missing capability resource
uses the reference discovery manifest by default

capabilities.purpose: Cross-check approved stack, task graph, engineering capabilities, reference discovery and coverage, governance topology, capability profiles, visual design gates, source-writing safety, production gates and objective conflict policy so platform work cannot drift away from the active foundation objective.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: objective conflict policy requires production preflight command

capabilities.purpose: Keep the active reusable platform foundation goal completion claim tied to current task evidence, business-neutral reference boundaries, approved stack alignment, visual design gates and explicit production/codegen promotion blockers.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: completionStatus must be complete when all foundation task nodes are implemented
engineering capability matrix must include goal-completion-audit
deployment topology decision.vercelRequired must stay false
must not contain completed approval values
completedEvidenceSchema.artifactURIPolicy must match source approval package
rejects submitted evidence with local or private artifact URIs
rejects future promotion gates that drop external artifact URI evidence
rejects completion audits whose promotion evidence gate omits the submitted package validator

capabilities.purpose: Keep every implemented foundation task node tied to focused cleanup evidence, resource-lock review, objective-conflict review and visual design-gate evidence, while reserving neat-freak for phase, major-task and release closeout.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: implemented task ${task.id} must declare node closeout evidence
rejects implemented task nodes without closeout evidence
rejects visual closeouts that lack brainstorming and product-design evidence

capabilities.purpose: Keep the persistent reusable platform foundation objective machine-checkable across approved stack, reference-only zshenmez usage, task blockers, visual workflow gates, deployment topology, production preflight and closeout knowledge cleanup.

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: visualPolicy.requiredOrder must stay superpowers:brainstorming before product-design
rejects turning zshenmez from reference-only input into a migration source
rejects requiring neat-freak for every node closeout
rejects closeout policies without the node closeout audit contract

capabilities.purpose: Centralize resource write and projection policy, digest-only sessions, private files, transport security, rate limiting and redacted audit/export boundaries before public release.

label.zh: 管理台水印与导出治理

capabilities.purpose: Provide one accessible, responsive watermark policy for screen counts and policy-review JSON export provenance without changing canonical or original artifacts.
Provide versioned field policies, application-layer encryption, blind indexes and controlled historical migration for recoverable personal data.

label.zh: 可配置脱敏策略运行时

capabilities.purpose: Apply versioned, field-configurable masking strategies consistently across admin projections and exports.
Protect plaintext reveal with server-owned policy, step-up verification, short-lived grants and append-only audit.

label.zh: 数据生命周期与保留策略

capabilities.purpose: Provide resource-declared deletion, recovery, retention and maintenance-only controlled purge semantics through a persistent GORM lifecycle runtime that is disabled by default.
Define executable service manifests across Admin, Service, Control, External and Event planes with explicit identity, tenant, reliability and compatibility boundaries.

label.zh: 持久化查询与命令对象运行时
label.en: Persisted Query And Command Object Runtime

capabilities.purpose: Execute versioned server-registered query and command objects with typed arguments, authorization, tenant and data scope, cost limits and parameterized repository compilation.
Define optional message queue and search ports that remain disabled until explicitly composed and configured.

label.zh: 组织权限与菜单合同迁移设计
label.en: Organization RBAC And Menu Contract Migration Design

capabilities.purpose: Freeze organization role-pool, derived-tenant, role-group ownership, menu visibility, permission and migration contracts before runtime implementation.

label.zh: 组织角色池后端约束与迁移
label.en: Organization Role Pool Backend And Migration

capabilities.purpose: Enforce organization role-group bindings, derived tenant integrity, assignable role pools and conflict-aware migrations across every backend entry point.
Provide organization, role-group and user administration with derived tenant display, role-pool filtering and explicit conflict handling.
Manage the strict role-group and role tree while separating menu assignment from API and button permission assignment through governed transfer controls.

label.zh: 菜单树与页面按钮权限配置
label.en: Menu Tree And Button Permission Configuration

capabilities.purpose: Model directory and page menus separately from API and button permissions, with migration-safe tree configuration and authorization boundaries.

label.zh: 组织权限与菜单全链路验收
label.en: Organization RBAC And Menu End-To-End QA

capabilities.purpose: Verify organization role-pool enforcement, tenant derivation, role and menu administration, authorization migration and browser-visible accessibility across the complete workflow.
Govern stable public error codes, lifecycle metadata, request correlation, redaction and generated Admin/App/service contracts without exposing internal errors.

label.zh: 多数据源合同与运行时

capabilities.purpose: Route declared resources through isolated, validated datasource configurations without weakening platform contracts.
Resolve trusted tenant context through versioned placement configuration to datasource groups, shards and schemas with controlled override and audit boundaries.
Route primary and replica operations with transaction-primary enforcement, write-after-read stickiness, replication-lag policy and controlled failover.
Provide explicit shard keys, global IDs, routing versions, controlled expansion, rebalancing and auditable tenant migration workflows.
Execute controlled read-only federated persisted queries with tenant isolation, timeout, cost, field and row boundaries outside ordinary OLTP repositories.
Provide a default-off XA adapter with certified resource-manager compatibility, timeouts, heuristic recovery and explicit operational procedures.
Publish evidence-backed compatibility tiers for supported and planned relational database targets.

label.zh: 事务发件箱与单消息队列适配器
label.en: Transactional Outbox And One MQ Adapter

capabilities.purpose: Provide durable transactional event publication with one production-ready message queue adapter.
Build recoverable asynchronous search projections without making search infrastructure a source of truth.
Make fresh clones portable without private paths, sibling repositories or agent-only tooling and produce a sanitized public release tree.
Deliver public community documentation, a bilingual Docusaurus site, GitHub Pages, CI and the sanitized v0.1.0 repository release.
